title: penstemon incertus
intro: Penstemon incertus, also known as a variable beardtongue, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. Traditionally, Penstemon incertus has been used in herbal medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues and reducing fever, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. In herbal preparations, Penstemon incertus can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its potential benefits.
